name: STG · AI · Webhook → AI Operator Response Formatter · DHR
description: AI | Formats subagent raw_output by type (text/json/list/email/script), writes to Supabase tool_outputs, fires in-app notification, returns formatted result. OWNER: Dhruv | p1:high | ai-powered | ENV: STG

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, session_id: $json.session_id, tool_id: $json.tool_id, output_type: $json.output_type, raw_output: $json.raw_output, formatted_output: $json.formatted_for_storage, created_at: $json.created_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, session_id: $json.session_id, tool_id: $json.tool_id, type: 'tool_complete', message: $json.notification_message, read: false, created_at: $json.created_at }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, tool_id: $('Code - Format Output').first().json.tool_id, output_type: $('Code - Format Output').first().json.output_type, formatted_output: $('Code - Format Output').first().json.formatted_output, notification: $('Code - Format Output').first().json.notification_message }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · AI · Webhook → AI Operator Response Formatter · DHR', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
